statute: Ohio Revised Code § 4722 (Home Construction Services Suppliers Act); Updated by HB50 (2024)
license_notes: Ohio does not require a statewide contractor license for general contracting. Specific trades (electrical, plumbing, HVAC) require state licenses. Some cities have local requirements.

mandatory_clauses.label: Consumer rights notice
mandatory_clauses.text:
CONSUMER RIGHTS UNDER OHIO LAW

Under the Ohio Home Construction Services Suppliers Act (R.C. § 4722), as a consumer you have the following rights:

1. To receive a written contract before work begins
2. To receive an itemized statement of work to be performed and materials to be used
3. To have any changes to the contract agreed to in writing before the changes are made
4. To have disputes resolved through the Ohio Attorney General's Consumer Protection Section if needed

If you have questions about your rights, contact the Ohio Attorney General's office at 1-800-282-0515.

mandatory_clauses.label: Mechanics lien notice
mandatory_clauses.text:
NOTICE OF LIEN RIGHTS

Under Ohio law (R.C. § 1311), subcontractors, material suppliers, and laborers who work on your property may have the right to file a mechanic's lien against your property if they are not paid. If a lien is filed and not discharged, you may be required to pay the lien amount even if you have already paid your general contractor. To protect yourself, obtain written lien waivers from all subcontractors and suppliers before making final payment.

mandatory_clauses.label: Federal 3-day right to cancel (TILA)

penalties_for_non_compliance: HCSSA violations = unfair or deceptive act, civil penalties, consumer may rescind. AG can bring enforcement action.
notes: Ohio's HCSSA was significantly updated by HB50 (signed June 28, 2024) to add remodelers to its coverage. Written contract required for jobs over $25. Federal 3-day notice satisfies state cancellation requirements. Specific trades (electrical, plumbing, HVAC) require state trade licenses. Check local municipality for additional requirements.
